Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
items.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits ...

items.title: Linux devs are fighting the new age-gated internet
items.description: In January, Colorado lawmakers introduced a proposal to make operating systems collect users' ages and pass them to app developers. The bill, SB26-051, had clearly been designed for commercial platforms like iOS and Android - one of numerous plans to age-gate the internet through users' devices. It ...

items.title: OpenAI’s Codex is now in the ChatGPT mobile app
items.description: OpenAI is going to let users access Codex, its desktop AI tool that can write code and use apps on your computer, from the ChatGPT app on your phone. items.title: Leaked images show Microsoft’s new Xbox Cloud Gaming controller

items.title: Americans do not want AI data centers in their backyards
items.description: Over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their area, according to a new Gallup survey. Just 7 percent said they were "strongly" in favor of new data centers. According to Gallup, data centers are so strongly disliked that Americans would prefer to live near a nuclear power ...
